vibe: Friday late-night grooves: deep house warmth meets new wave shimmer and trip-hop shadows

tracks.name: These Are Just Places To Me Now
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Chris Stussy's deep house — Folamour's joyful grooves and soulful textures

tracks.name: These Things Will Come To Be
tracks.reason: Lo-fi house meets the melodic warmth of his recent deep house rotation

tracks.name: Equation
tracks.reason: Balearic house vibes, adjacent to Franky Rizardo and the Amsterdam deep house scene

tracks.name: L.O.V.E. - Radio Edit
tracks.reason: Deep house cornerstone — fits the Kerri Chandler and Moodymann lane

tracks.name: Heaven or Las Vegas
tracks.reason: Dream pop meets new wave — Talk Talk and New Order adjacent, ethereal shimmer

tracks.name: Glory Box
tracks.reason: Trip-hop sibling to Massive Attack's dark textures and cinematic weight

tracks.name: Falaise
tracks.reason: Electronic explorer bridging jazz and deep house — Yussef Dayes and &ME adjacent

tracks.name: Coffee in the Morning - Radio Edit
tracks.reason: Amsterdam deep house duo adjacent to Dennis Quin and Chris Stussy

tracks.name: Ghosts - Remix
tracks.reason: Art-pop/new wave — Talk Talk's closest peer, David Sylvian's haunting minimalism

tracks.name: Archangel
tracks.reason: UK electronic — dark textures like Massive Attack meets the nocturnal energy of his deep house listening
